data.full_response:
Investigation complete. Updated existing GitHub issue #5 with additional findings about the incomplete credentials page that has multiple structural issues beyond just the syntax error:

**Root Cause:** The file `/apps/admin/app/dashboard/credentials/page.tsx` was committed in an incomplete state with:
1. Orphaned code block without a function declaration (lines 87-95)
2. Missing `useState` declaration for `editForm`
3. Empty `onChange` handler causing the build failure

**Action Taken:** Added comment to existing issue #5 with the additional findings and recommended fixes.

**Memory Persisted:**
- Incident details and root cause
- Infrastructure topology (project ID, environment ID, service IDs)

arguments.content: Incident 2026-04-16: zeus.hiveloop.com deployment failures due to syntax error in /apps/admin/app/dashboard/credentials/page.tsx. The file was committed in an incomplete state with: (1) orphaned code block without function declaration, (2) missing useState for editForm, (3) empty onChange handler. GitHub issue #5 created. Root cause: incomplete code committed as part of large 1190-file change.

Railway project hiveloop.com (ID: 55776e03-e6c2-4a9b-828b-4e759495aa70) has production environment (ID: 3c177170-0fb2-4dcb-a034-12676bb242c6). Service zeus.hiveloop.com (ID: 1a5a0fa2-aca3-4c4b-9489-1167a20471c7) is the admin dashboard app at apps/admin in hiveloop/hiveloop repo. Other services include api.postgres.hiveloop.com (PostgreSQL database).
arguments.context: Infrastructure topology from deployment failure investigation
